name: lifeos
description: LifeOS AI monorepo — Angular frontend, NestJS backend, shared types.

scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=@lifeos/shared-types && npm run build --workspace=frontend && npm run build --workspace=backend
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace=frontend && npm run lint --workspace=backend
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace=frontend -- --watch=false --browsers=ChromeHeadless && npm run test --workspace=backend
